ident_heading: Privacy Policy and Terms of Service
heading_content_part: Privacy Policy and Terms of ServiceMelting Source’s Docs Viewer (the “Service”) allows you touse Google Drive to view documents (the “Content”) on Android.To this end, Docs Viewer needs to upload said documentsto Melting Source’s and/or Google’s servers.Because documents are uploaded to Google’s servers for conversion purposes,by using Docs Viewer you agree to be bound by Google’sTerms of Service,as well as the following additional terms of service.

CopyrightYou retain copyright and any other rights you already holdin Content which you submit, post or display on or through, the Service.By submitting, posting or displaying the Contentyou give Melting Source and Google aperpetual, irrevocable, worldwide, royalty-free, and non-exclusive licenseto reproduce, adapt, modify, translate, publish, publicly perform,publicly display and distribute any Content whichyou submit, post or display on or through, the Service.
This license is for the sole purpose of enabling Melting Source and Googleto provide you with the Service in accordance with this andGoogle’sprivacy policy.

SecurityThe Content which you view through the Service,is transmitted to/from Melting Sources’s and/or Google’s servers securely.Content uploaded to Melting Source’s servers, in particular,is stored securely and for no longer than 2 days before being automatically deleted.Uploaded Content is not being monitored in any way by Melting Source.

AdvertisingMelting Source may show you ads while using the Service.We will not share any uploaded Content with advertising networks and/or advertisers.You should be aware that the advertisers’ privacy policies may differ from our own.

AnalyticsMelting Source reserves the right to anonymously track and report your use of the Service,to our third party statistical service providers,so we can better understand usage patterns and evaluate necessary improvements.We will not share any uploaded Content with such third parties.
